the newbie one
but this game is complicated, meta changes
some old units fell off others are still op
new units can come out and make old units suddenly top tier
so giving "must pull" advice is not really possible
just pull whatever u like and is good
also there are no units that are completely useless
so even if u like an off meta unit you can still clear endgame with them
there r strong units but the game isnt hard enough that u need them to clear
and the game isnt unbalamced enough that certain units r too OP

content: idk if angbak made one for this week yet
Yeah I want one for the one that just arrived 2 days ago
heres some examples i did on my alt
Technically my a5 clears are all low investment
i only have ultra characters
but yea

i've tried messing around with vortice as main damage dealer but i dont understand how people get her to deal good damage with exalt, got her WoD, slapped more RM on her, got decent enough crit rate to crit, stack up to 3 tentacles before setting it into red stance, pop her exalt and then i just did allat for like 12-15k on a crit hit
highest i've had it go was like 30k in d-tide
you need to pursuit a lot
its multiplicative with tentacle damage, needs rouse too
and reload skill levels
my reload is 6 but exalt is only 5 because i'm broke now 😔
i used a lv90 vortice support and was able to consistently get 300-500k without much setup
just stalling for a few turns
it will do no damage if u have no tentacle damage
also make sure u have vulnerable etc

only thing i'm missing is april tribute because i went on a whole side quest to clear d-tide, events, etc and havent finished ch8 normal yet because i didnt want to skip story since i know that if i skip something i'm never going back to read it <:24_Clown:1468259444423921871>
you don't need april tribute
needless to say all 827k of that 1-turn damage was vortice
i think it was hitting multiple mobs though
so like 270k x3
or something
it self supplies 150% crit damage so you don't really need to build it , the main thing is building the team to spam pursuit 1+ times per turn to build tentacle damage
the exalt is a giant multiplier of tentacle damage

not really?  just ask here if you have Qs about specific chars
- more effects = better (if a skill level boosts 3 skill values, rather than just 1, that's value <:kath_cool:1447714576413233315>)
- you only rouse 1/battle, so unless it has some absurd scaling, I leave that and exalt till last (the rare mats make leveling exalt pricier unless it's really crucial to that unit)
- eventually you'll want everyone at skill 3 across the board, but for me, my main damage dealer and shielder took priority 📈

Hm. I see. If you had thais and/or horla selected on that banner I would say pull, but since you already have e1 ryker and hamel I think you should probably be set on that banner. Pulling more would be a bit risky because you might end up with more dupes on a support that doesn't really use them.

Ryker is decent with kath if you are playing mono chaos, he's your primary vuln source there. If you are splashing ultra in he is still ok. I think probably saving for arachne and/or half anni would make sense.

I don't think dupes on doll inferno will help you much. You don't have xu and her OE is very far away. Don't think any of the other banners would help much either (you don't have any of the aequor teams that tulu can support).
